task_completion.description: Locate the 'Standard Project Template' in the 'Templates' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the agent navigating to the 'Templates' workspace and viewing the 'Standard Project Template'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Project Phoenix' workspace in the 'Projects' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a new workspace titled 'Project Phoenix' located under the 'Projects' directory.

task_completion.description: Ensure the '01-Planning' folder was copied to the new workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Project Phoenix' workspace contents shows a folder exactly named '01-Planning'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the '02-Financials' folder was copied to the new workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Project Phoenix' workspace contents shows a folder exactly named '02-Financials'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the '03-Legal' folder was copied to the new workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Project Phoenix' workspace contents shows a folder exactly named '03-Legal'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Project-Checklist' file was copied along with the template
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Project-Checklist' file present inside the '01-Planning' folder of the new 'Project Phoenix' workspace, confirming a recursive copy of the template.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to copy the template, not terminal commands or scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, curl commands, or scripts are visible being used to bypass the UI for workspace creation or copying.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine web application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a real web browser interacting with the document management system interface, not a text editor or static HTML mockup.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's built-in copy/paste or template features
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the agent clicking UI buttons like 'Copy', 'Paste', or 'Create from Template' rather than manually creating empty folders one by one.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target workspace must be created at '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Project-Phoenix' with the exact title 'Project Phoenix'. The source template is located at '/default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Standard-Project-Template'. The successfully copied workspace must contain exactly these child folders: '01-Planning', '02-Financials', and '03-Legal'. Furthermore, the '01-Planning' folder must contain the 'Project-Checklist' file as proof that the template contents were fully copied.
